clauses.text: Payment terms are Net-45 from the date of invoice.
All work product created by Provider specifically for Client shall be owned by Client upon full payment.
Each party agrees to hold the other party's Confidential Information in strict confidence.
Provider shall process personal data only in accordance with Client's instructions and applicable data protection laws.
Each party shall indemnify and hold harmless the other party from any third-party claims.
Each party's total aggregate liability shall not exceed three times (3x) the fees paid in the twelve months preceding the claim.
Either party may terminate this MSA for convenience upon sixty (60) days written notice.
Neither party shall be liable for delays or failures resulting from circumstances beyond its reasonable control.
The MSA shall automatically renew for successive one year periods unless either party provides ninety days notice.
This MSA shall be governed by the laws of the State of New York.
